sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63536" key="liponauti/ou" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπο-ναυτίου</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γραφή</foreign>, indictment <sense id="n63536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">against one who deserts his ship</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">duty at sea</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
